dataEntries.name: Usual resident population (Census 2021, by LGD)
dataEntries.description: Total usual resident population recorded in the 2021 Census, broken down by Northern Ireland's 11 post-2014 Local Government Districts. Each LGD polygon is shaded by population on a viridis colour ramp; full numeric breakdown shown in the table panel that appears at the bottom right when the entry is loaded.

source.title: NISRA Census 2021, Main Statistics Phase 1, MS-A01
